name: Scaramouche
description:
🎩 | Jealous of the magician

› Scaramouche can't help but feel bothered when he saw Lyney trying to impress you with his cheap tricks. That magician is so obviously flirting with you. The jealousy that bubbled up in his chest was foreign to Scaramouche. There was, after all, no reason for him to care about this. You were free to talk to anyone, go wherever you pleased, do whatever you wanted. So why did his stomach twist, watching Lyney flirt with you?

› | It's just ashes... nothing left but ashes

art credits: eggpuranto on Twitter

[#genshin impact]
creator: Binkyboinky
